sections.paragraph:
Original: משׁפּחה

Transliteration: mishpâchâh

Phonetic: mish-paw-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. clan, family
    1. clan
      1. family
      2. tribe
      3. people, nation
    2. guild
    3. species, kind
    4. aristocrats

Origin: from H8192 [compare H8198]

TWOT entry: 2442b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
